_doc: Static file inventory for the diversity atlas. Round-1 ships exactly one file: the bulk JSON snapshot of the 37 MODULE_3 tables embedded in the legacy v2.4 HTML. The shell does not preload it via the file registry today — the data_loader module fetches it directly. Listed here for packaging and integrity checks.

embedded_tables._doc: Single JSON with all 37 dt_* blobs from Diversity_atlas.html v2.4 (D.globals + D.S1..D.S12 + D.ST1..D.ST5 + D.SD1..D.SD8 + D.SZ + D.REF + meta blocks). Loaded once by shared/data_loader.js.

texture_metrics._doc: Per-sample texture metrics consumed by page9. Round-2 ships an empty stub; the full payload is emitted by catfish-diversity-analysis phase_2_discovery/04_window_H_and_DDI.sh and contains: params{}, cohort_summary{}, per_sample[] (sample, h_gw, ddi, chi_min, chi_min_chr, chi_min_pos, median_H_w, mad_H_w), windows{ chroms[], cohort_median_H_w[], cohort_q25_H_w[], cohort_q75_H_w[] }, per_sample_H_w{ sample_id: [H_w per window] }. Estimated full size ~25 MB at 50 kb windows × 226 samples; consider parquet/binary if it grows beyond browser-comfort range. Loaded by shared/data_loader.js in parallel with embedded_tables; a missing file resolves to null and page9 renders the 'data pending' card.

functional_burden._doc: Functional burden / selection efficacy payload consumed by page10. Round-3 ships an empty stub; full payload is emitted by the upstream pipeline running bcftools csq + snpEff + VESM + custom splice module. Schema in SPEC_2026-05-12_functional_burden.md §4: variant_inventory[] (snpEff impact × mutation type), snpeff_totals[], gerp_inventory[] (off by default), per_sample[] (πN, πS, πN/πS, π0/π4, vesm_burden, lof_count, splice_count, ROH_overlap_fraction), per_group['K=8'][], pairwise_ks (K–S P-value matrices per layer), top_burden_genes_by_group, transcripts{}, splice_events[], msa_links (variant_id → SVG path). MSA SVGs live in atlases/diversity/data/msa/<variant_id>.svg, pre-rendered by pyMSAviz upstream. Loaded by shared/data_loader.js; absent → page10 'data pending' card.

roh_gene_overlap._doc: ROH × gene-model intersection product consumed by the page5 extension (Plot A cumulative gene-burden stack + Plot B biotype × peak heatmap-table). Round-3 ships an empty stub. Schema in SPEC_2026-05-12_roh_gene_burden.md §4 + §5: blocks[] (per-block { gene_ids[], biotype, constraint_score }), peaks[] (named ROH peaks with biotype_counts), per_group_cumulative['K=8'][] (cumulative high-constraint-gene count vs ROH-block rank, per group). Constraint proxy still data-blocked (§6.2 — pLI analog for catfish; possibly GERP ≥ 4 from teleost alignment if that track ever lands). Loaded by shared/data_loader.js; absent → page5 renders the standard ROH composition view without the new burden cards.

divergence_network._doc: Pairwise group-divergence network payload consumed by page11. Round-3 ships an empty stub. Schema in SPEC_2026-05-12_divergence_network.md §4: nodes[] (K=8 group label, n_samples, pi, pi_ci), edges[] (group_i, group_j, fst, fst_ci, dxy, dxy_ci, dA, n_bootstrap), alternative_groupings{} (farm, sex, karyotype:<inv_id>). Estimator (Weir & Cockerham vs Hudson vs Reynolds) is pipeline-side (§9.1); atlas reads whatever number ships. Loaded by shared/data_loader.js; absent → page11 'data pending' card.
